name: ku4es-ui-testing
description: kodmunki Utilities for ECMAScript UI Testing

scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run test-cov
scripts.docs: npm run jsdocs && npm run mddocs
scripts.build: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && babel src -d dist --source-maps inline
scripts.version:alpha: npm version prerelease --preid=alpha --no-git-tag-version && git commit -am'alpha' && git push
scripts.version:beta: npm version prerelease --preid=beta --no-git-tag-version && git commit -am'beta' && git push
scripts.version:rc: npm version prerelease --preid=rc --no-git-tag-version && git commit -am'rc' && git push
scripts.release:alpha: npm run build && npm run version:alpha && npm publish --tag next
scripts.release:beta: npm run build && npm run version:beta && npm publish --tag next
scripts.release:rc: npm run build && npm run version:rc && npm publish --tag next

author: kodmunki
